title: Republic Dark Age
content:
{{Top|leg|canon=Fall of the Old Republic|unmatched=1}}
{{Quote|The final hundred years of the Draggulch period are sometimes called the Republic's "dark age." The Republic could no longer afford to maintain its communications network, dropping all settlements outside the Core off the grid and forcing them to rely on hyperspace courier ships. At the same time, an outbreak of the Candorian plague killed off as much as two-thirds of the citizens of some major population centers.|[[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]]|<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>}}
The '''Republic Dark Age''' was the term given to the last century of the [[New Sith Wars]], from around [[1100 BBY/Legends|1100 BBY]] to the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]] of [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]]. During the Republic Dark Age, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], in the eyes of later centuries, was temporarily disbanded.

==History==
Since the start of the [[Draggulch Period]] in [[2000 BBY/Legends|2000 BBY]], the Old Republic had been in decline. During the series of conflicts known as the [[New Sith Wars]], thousands of worlds were abandoned to the [[New Sith]] Empire, while more were abandoned during the Republic's retreat. Thousands of longstanding corporations went bankrupt, lawlessness spread as the Republic became increasingly overburdened and ineffectual, and numerous mines of valuable minerals dried up. The decline of its political structure escalated following the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] victory at the [[Battle of Mizra]] in [[1466 BBY]].<ref name="TNEC" />

However, all these events were merely a prelude to the Dark Age. The [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] granted almost all of its authority to the [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]], many of whom were [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] at that point, such as [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Genarra]]. Throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], Jedi joined in bands to defend individual worlds, and even regions of space, from Sith, pirates, slavers and warlords. In some regions, the Jedi supported existing governments, though in others, Jedi became rulers themselves in order to protect the population from external threats. The more troubled regions were divided by the Supreme Chancellors into Jedi baronial sectors, in an attempt to coordinate the continuing war against the Sith. Although the unity of the Sith seems to have been broken by infighting, and the ongoing conflict was officially portrayed as merely a series of clashes against an illegal organization, the situation wore down the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] and [[Republic Army|Army]], which likewise fell under increasing Jedi control.

A major charge in the galactic status quo, the Old Republic also could no longer afford to maintain the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] beyond the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], so communications beyond had to be maintained through couriers.<ref name="TNEC" /> In a drastic move, the Republic deactivated hyperspace relays beyond the Core, Colonies, and parts of the Inner Rim, severing instantaneous communication with the Outer Rim and disrupting Sith conquests. This denied the Sith real-time hyperspace data, leaving them reliant on outdated coordinates.<ref name="TEAextra">{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-the-knight-errant-gazetter|text=Essential Atlas Extra: The Knight Errant Gazetteer|int=The Knight Errant Gazetteer}}</ref> Even worse, a galaxywide epidemic of [[Candorian plague/Legends|Candorian plague]] killed off as much as two-thirds of the population of some worlds.<ref name="TNEC" /> Republic forces were weakened by disease, while worlds under quarantine could not be protected at all. At the same time, Sith Lords, who cared little for the well-being of their own troops, took advantage and conquered these worlds.<ref name="TEAextra" />

Great libraries and storehouses of ancient wisdom have been seized or destroyed by Sith invaders. In regions under Sith control, technological advancement has largely stagnated. With little commercial incentive for innovation, some Sith territories lack any form of currency, relying entirely on slave labor or droids for manufacturing.<ref name="TEAextra" /> Nevertheless, some corporations continue to operate under Sith rule. Certain Sith Lords permit firms to function in their space, provided they share the profits. The Republic has strongly encouraged all corporations with operations in Sith-controlled territory to withdraw behind the cordon, both to protect their personnel and to prevent Republic technology from falling into enemy hands.<ref name="TEAextra" />

As already noted, it seems that the threat from the Sith may have been much diminished compared with previous centuries, but at the end of this period, around [[1010 BBY]], [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Skere Kaan|Kaan]] reorganized the feuding Sith into the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]], and embarked on the last of the New Sith Wars, sometimes known as the [[Light and Darkness War]].<ref name="TNEC" /> Republic forces led by commanders like [[Hoth (Jedi Lord)|Hoth]], a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and [[General/Legends|General]], won some notable victories, initially driving Kaan's forces from their stronghold in [[Cloak of the Sith/Legends|the Cloak of the Sith]], but the Sith reconquered their ancient capital on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], and also struck deep into the Core Worlds.

For the final two or three years of the war, however, much of the attention of the Jedi and Sith was focused on the planet [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]], near [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], where the entire Brotherhood of Darkness fought the Jedi who Hoth had formed into the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] in a protracted series of engagements.

Presumably, the Dark Age was considered over by either the Sith defeat at the [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan]], or the following [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]].

==Timeline of the Republic Dark Age==
*[[1100 BBY/Legends|1100 BBY]]
**[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] is rediscovered by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

*[[1094 BBY]]
**The planet [[Melida/Daan/Legends|Melida/Daan]] is colonized.

*[[1066 BBY]]
**[[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Calimondra family]] martiarch [[Vilia Calimondra|Vilia]] enacts the first ''[[Charge Matrica]]'' to select a claimant from among her seven children.<ref name="Knight Errant novel">[[Knight Errant (novel)|''Knight Errant'']]</ref>

*[[1050 BBY/Legends|1050 BBY]]
**''Charge Matrica'' ends with the ascendancy of [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Chagras]], who becomes the ruler of the [[Chagras Hegemony]].<ref name="Knight Errant novel" />

*[[1042 BBY]]
**While serving under the Chagras Hegemony, [[Odion]] carries out the [[Massacre of Aquilaris]].<ref name="SWKE2">[[Knight Errant 2|''Knight Errant'' 2]]</ref>
**Odion launches [[Project Pandemonium]], a top-secret mission to locate the [[Helm of Ieldis]], an ancient Sith artifact.<ref name="SWKE14">[[Knight Errant: Escape 4|''Knight Errant: Escape'' 4]]</ref>

*[[1040 BBY]]
**Sith Lord Chagras dies under unknown circumstances.<ref name="TEAextra" />
***The ''[[Second Charge Matrica]]'' breaks out among Vilia's grandchildren,<ref name="Knight Errant novel" /> causing the Hegemony to break up into several domains.<ref name="TEAextra" />

*[[1032 BBY/Legends|1032 BBY]]
**[[Operation Influx]] takes place.<ref name="SWKE1">[[Knight Errant 1|''Knight Errant'' 1]]</ref>
**Jedi Knight [[Kerra Holt]] carries out a personal campaign against warring Sith Lords [[Daiman]] and Odion.<ref name="SWKE1" />
**[[Chelloa]]'s surface is [[Destruction of Chelloa|destroyed]], but planet's population is evacuated by the [[Freedom Fleet]].<ref name="SWKE5">[[Knight Errant 5|''Knight Errant'' 5]]</ref>
**[[Battle of Gazzari]] ends in the [[Invasion of the Bactranate|invasion and collapse]] of the [[Bactranate]].<ref name="Knight Errant novel" />
**[[Arkadianate]] annexes the [[Dyarchy]] world of [[Byllura]].<ref name="Knight Errant novel" />
**[[Siege of Calimondretta]] occurs when Kerra and [[Brigadier]] [[Jarrow Rusher]] escape from the Arkadianate capital of [[Syned]].<ref name="Knight Errant novel" />
**Three-way [[Aquilaris campaign]] occurs, resulting in the [[Great Aquilaris Deluge]].<ref name="SWKE6">[[Knight Errant: Deluge 1|''Knight Errant: Deluge'' 1]]</ref><ref name="SWKE9">[[Knight Errant: Deluge 4|''Knight Errant: Deluge'' 4]]</ref>
**[[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] lord [[Zodoh]]'s invasion of Sith territory is defeated at the [[Battle of Darkknell]].<ref name="SWKE10">[[Knight Errant: Deluge 5|''Knight Errant: Deluge'' 5]]</ref>
**Odion resumes Project Pandemonium and succeeds in capturing the Helm of Ieldis on [[Skarpos]].<ref name="SWKE14" />
**Odion's apocalyptic bid for galactic domination ends with his death at the [[Battle of Vanahame]].<ref name="SWKE15">[[Knight Errant: Escape 5|''Knight Errant: Escape'' 5]]</ref>
**Odionate collapses and is divided up among his relatives; liberation of [[Odionate cloister]] child inmates.<ref name="SWKE15" />

*[[1026 BBY]]
**Dessel, who would later become [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]], is born on [[Apatros/Legends|Apatros]].

*[[1010 BBY]]
**A Sith Lord creates the [[Behemoth from the World Below]] on [[Aduba-3/Legends|Aduba-3]].
**[[Dannik Jerriko]] is born on [[Anzat/Legends|Anzat]].
**Rain (who would later become [[Darth Zannah/Legends|Darth Zannah]]) is born on [[Somov Rit]].

*[[1006 BBY]]
**[[Battle of Korriban (New Sith Wars)|Battle of Korriban]]

*c. [[1004 BBY]] (campaigns of [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Hoth (Jedi Lord)|Hoth]])
**Campaign in the [[Cloak of the Sith/Legends|Cloak of the Sith]]
**[[Battle of Hoth (New Sith Wars)|Battle of Hoth]]
**[[Battle of Dromund Kaas (New Sith Wars)|Battle of Dromund Kaas]]

*[[1003 BBY]]
**[[Battle of Kashyyyk (New Sith Wars)|Battle of Kashyyyk]]
**[[Battle of Hsskhor]]

*[[1002 BBY]]
**[[Battle of Phaseera]]
**[[First Battle of Ruusan]]
**[[Second Battle of Ruusan]]
**[[Battle of Bespin (New Sith Wars)|Battle of Bespin]]
**[[Battle of Sullust (New Sith Wars)|Battle of Sullust]]
**[[Battle of Taanab (New Sith Wars)|Battle of Taanab]]
**Invasion of [[Bormea sector/Legends|Bormea sector]]
**[[Third Battle of Ruusan]]

*[[1001 BBY]]
**[[Spira/Legends|Spira]] is colonized.

*[[1001 BBY]]–[[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]]
**[[Battle of Harpori]]
**[[Duel on Balowa]]
**Clashes on [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]]
**[[Fourth Battle of Ruusan]]
**[[Fifth Battle of Ruusan]]
**[[Sixth Battle of Ruusan]]
**[[Seventh Battle of Ruusan]]
